MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Jannik P. Catalano, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Richard G. Hornby
Robert J. Frassetto, Esq., and David Blinn, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: China Basin Ballpark Company and San Francisco Baseball Associates, L.P.

After hearing, Plaintiff Richard Hornby's motion to cmopel further responses to request for production of documents, (set no. Two) and special interrogatories (Set no. One), is granted subject to Protective Order contemporaneously granted. Sanctions denied.
